attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_CST_UPLD_PO_DATA.PO_SEQ_ID, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_CST_UPLD_PO_DATA.REQUISITION_NUMBER, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_CST_UPLD_PO_DATA.PO_NUMBER, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_CST_UPLD_PO_DATA.PO_LINE_NUMBER, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_CST_UPLD_PO_DATA.PO_LINE_ID, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_CST_UPLD_PO_DATA.PO_LINE_DESC, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_CST_UPLD_PO_DATA.PO_DATE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_CST_UPLD_PO_DATA.GES_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_CST_UPLD_PO_DATA.CURRENCY_CODE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_CST_UPLD_PO_DATA.PRICE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_CST_UPLD_PO_DATA.QUANTITY, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_CST_UPLD_PO_DATA.PO_REQUESTOR, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_CST_UPLD_PO_DATA.PR_REQUESTOR, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_CST_UPLD_PO_DATA.VENDOR_NAME, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_CST_UPLD_PO_DATA.CHARGE_ACCT_SEGMENTS, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_CST_UPLD_PO_DATA.DEPT_NUMBER, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_CST_UPLD_PO_DATA.PROJECT_NUMBER, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_CST_UPLD_PO_DATA.ORG_ID, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_CST_UPLD_PO_DATA.EXPENDITURE_ORG, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_CST_UPLD_PO_DATA.PROCESS_FLAG, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_CST_UPLD_PO_DATA.ERROR_CODE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_CST_UPLD_PO_DATA.LOCK_MODE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_CST_UPLD_PO_DATA.CREATION_DATE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_CST_UPLD_PO_DATA.CREATED_BY, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_CST_UPLD_PO_DATA.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_CST_UPLD_PO_DATA.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_CST_UPLD_PO_DATA.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_CST_UPLD_PO_DATA.REQUEST_ID, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_CST_UPLD_PO_DATA.PO_START_DATE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_CST_UPLD_PO_DATA.PO_END_DATE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_CST_UPLD_PO_DATA.CLOSED_CODE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_CST_UPLD_PO_DATA.CANCEL_FLAG, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_CST_UPLD_PO_DATA.OGG_KEY_ID, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_CST_UPLD_PO_DATA.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_CST_UPLD_PO_DATA.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_CST_UPLD_PO_DATA.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_CST_UPLD_PO_DATA.REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_CST_UPLD_PO_DATA STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_CST_UPLD_PO_DATA,
 (
 select OGG_KEY_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_CST_UPLD_PO_DATA
 minus
 select OGG_KEY_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_CST_UPLD_PO_DATA
 ) ACM 
 where 
 ACM.OGG_KEY_ID = STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_CST_UPLD_PO_DATA.OGG_KEY_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_CST_UPLD_PO_DATA.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_COST_UPLD_PO_DT)
